name: OBI-1 > 0.5 (Horizon 5)
hypothesis: The parent spec iter000_obi1_gt_05 showed an extremely high (93.7%) win rate at a 1-tick horizon. This spec tests if that strong predictive power persists over a longer, more practical 5-tick horizon, as recommended by the feedback analyst.
mutation_note: Based on feedback (`change_horizon`) for iter000_obi1_gt_05 (WR=93.7%), extending prediction horizon from 1 to 5 ticks to test signal decay.
